title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Naukri Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
